tracks.meaning: to move forward or progress in position, time, or development
to propose or put forward an idea, plan, or suggestion for consideration
to provide money or credit to someone before payment is due
to move troops or forces forward toward enemy positions
to move an event or deadline to an earlier date
to promote someone to a higher rank, position, or level in a professional or academic hierarchy
payment or money given in anticipation of future earnings or services
a forward movement or improvement in technology, knowledge, or scientific understanding
the act of moving forward or progressing from one place or stage to another
